message.content:
@startuml
skinparam UMLClassBoxStyle background-color #f5f5f5
skinparam UMLClassBoxStyleBorderStyle solid
skinparam UMLClassBoxStyleBorderWidth 1
skinparam UMLClassBoxStyleColor #ffffff

class AspNetRoleClaims {
    <<partial>>
    AspNetRoleClaims

    Id : int <<get>> <<set>>
    ClaimType : string <<get>> <<set>>
    ClaimValue : string <<get>> <<set>>
    RoleId : string <<get>> <<set>>
    <<virtual>> Role : AspNetRoles <<get>> <<set>>
}

class AspNetRoles {
    <<partial>>
    AspNetRoles

    Id : int <<get>> <<set>>
    RoleName : string <<get>> <<set>>
    RoleDescription : string <<get>> <<set>>
}

AspNetRoleClaims -- AspNetRoles : <<virtual>> Role
@enduml
